name: bioethics_communications_outage_forces_harbor_tru_loy
premise: A trial’s DSMB flagged harm signal in one arm; sponsor wants to continue with amended consent while sites already enrolled vulnerable patients. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics communications outage forces harbor tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mira Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Mira Ibrahim, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Chandra
agents.identity: I am Zara Chandra, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Mira Ibrahim must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Mira Ibrahim do?
